mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_order ( cl_order_id, client_id, admin_id, cl_order_num, cl_order_date, product_id, cl_order_qty, cl_delivery_date, order_total_price, cl_order_status, delivery_address, cl_order_memo, post_code ) VALUES ( #{clOrderId}, #{clientId}, #{adminId}, #{clOrderNum}, #{clOrderDate}, #{productId}, #{clOrderQty}, #{clDeliveryDate}, #{orderTotalPrice}, 'REQUESTED', #{deliveryAddress}, #{clOrderMemo}, #{postCode} )
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(cl_order_id, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM client_order WHERE cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('CLT-', #{today}, '%')

SELECT co.*, c.client_name AS clientName, c.manager_name AS managerName, c.manager_tel AS managerTel, co.post_code AS postCode, co.delivery_address AS deliveryAddress FROM client_order co LEFT JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id WHERE co.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}
